canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>topo</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { background: #0a0a0f; overflow: hidden; }
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H, cols, rows;
const cellSize = 8;
let terrain = [];
let time = 0;
let mouse = { x: -1000, y: -1000, active: false, raising: true };
let eroding = false;

// Perlin noise implementation
class Perlin {
  constructor() {
    this.p = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < 512; i++) {
      this.p[i] = Math.floor(Math.random() * 256);
    }
  }
  
  fade(t) { return t * t * t * (t * (t * 6 - 15) + 10); }
  lerp(a, b, t) { return a + t * (b - a); }
  grad(hash, x, y) {
    const h = hash & 3;
    const u = h < 2 ? x : y;
    const v = h < 2 ? y : x;
    return ((h & 1) === 0 ? u : -u) + ((h & 2) === 0 ? v : -v);
  }
  
  noise(x, y) {
    const X = Math.floor(x) & 255;
    const Y = Math.floor(y) & 255;
    x -= Math.floor(x);
    y -= Math.floor(y);
    const u = this.fade(x);
    const v = this.fade(y);
    const A = this.p[X] + Y;
    const B = this.p[X + 1] + Y;
    return this.lerp(
      this.lerp(this.grad(this.p[A], x, y), this.grad(this.p[B], x - 1, y), u),
      this.lerp(this.grad(this.p[A + 1], x, y - 1), this.grad(this.p[B + 1], x - 1, y - 1), u),
      v
    );
  }
  
  octave(x, y, octaves) {
    let val = 0, amp = 1, freq = 1, max = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < octaves; i++) {
      val += this.noise(x * freq, y * freq) * amp;
      max += amp;
      amp *= 0.5;
      freq *= 2;
    }
    return val / max;
  }
}

const perlin = new Perlin();
const contourLevels = 12;

// Web Audio
let audioCtx, oscillators = [];
function initAudio() {
  audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
  // Ambient drone based on terrain
  for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
    const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
    const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
    osc.type = 'sine';
    osc.frequency.value = 60 + i * 30;
    gain.gain.value = 0;
    osc.connect(gain);
    gain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
    osc.start();
    oscillators.push({ osc, gain });
  }
}

function resize() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
  cols = Math.ceil(W / cellSize) + 1;
  rows = Math.ceil(H / cellSize) + 1;
  terrain = new Float32Array(cols * rows);
}

function getIdx(x, y) { return y * cols + x; }

function updateTerrain() {
  const baseScale = 0.015;
  const drift = time * 0.0003;
  
  for (let y = 0; y < rows; y++) {
    for (let x = 0; x < cols; x++) {
      const px = x * cellSize;
      const py = y * cellSize;
      
      // Base terrain from perlin
      let elevation = perlin.octave(x * baseScale + drift, y * baseScale + drift * 0.7, 4);
      elevation = (elevation + 1) * 0.5; // normalize to 0-1
      
      // Add some ridges
      const ridge = Math.abs(perlin.noise((x * baseScale * 2) + drift * 0.5, (y * baseScale * 2) + drift * 0.3));
      elevation += ridge * 0.3;
      
      // Mouse influence
      if (mouse.active) {
        const dx = px - mouse.x;
        const dy = py - mouse.y;
        const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
        const radius = 120;
        if (dist < radius) {
          const influence = Math.pow(1 - dist / radius, 2) * 0.4;
          elevation += mouse.raising ? influence : -influence;
        }
      }
      
      // Erosion simulation (simple thermal erosion)
      if (eroding && x > 0 && x < cols - 1 && y > 0 && y < rows - 1) {
        const current = terrain[getIdx(x, y)];
        const neighbors = [
          terrain[getIdx(x-1, y)], terrain[getIdx(x+1, y)],
          terrain[getIdx(x, y-1)], terrain[getIdx(x, y+1)]
        ];
        const avgNeighbor = neighbors.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / 4;
        elevation = elevation * 0.95 + avgNeighbor * 0.05;
      }
      
      terrain[getIdx(x, y)] = Math.max(0, Math.min(1.3, elevation));
    }
  }
}

// Marching squares for contour lines
function getContourSegments(level) {
  const segments = [];
  
  for (let y = 0; y < rows - 1; y++) {
    for (let x = 0; x < cols - 1; x++) {
      const tl = terrain[getIdx(x, y)];
      const tr = terrain[getIdx(x + 1, y)];
      const br = terrain[getIdx(x + 1, y + 1)];
      const bl = terrain[getIdx(x, y + 1)];
      
      // Marching squares case
      let caseIndex = 0;
      if (tl >= level) caseIndex |= 8;
      if (tr >= level) caseIndex |= 4;
      if (br >= level) caseIndex |= 2;
      if (bl >= level) caseIndex |= 1;
      
      if (caseIndex === 0 || caseIndex === 15) continue;
      
      const px = x * cellSize;
      const py = y * cellSize;
      
      // Interpolate edge positions
      const lerp = (a, b, t) => a + (b - a) * t;
      const edgeTop = lerp(px, px + cellSize, (level - tl) / (tr - tl + 0.0001));
      const edgeRight = lerp(py, py + cellSize, (level - tr) / (br - tr + 0.0001));
      const edgeBottom = lerp(px, px + cellSize, (level - bl) / (br - bl + 0.0001));
      const edgeLeft = lerp(py, py + cellSize, (level - tl) / (bl - tl + 0.0001));
      
      const addSeg = (x1, y1, x2, y2) => segments.push({ x1, y1, x2, y2 });
      
      // All 16 cases
      switch (caseIndex) {
        case 1: addSeg(px, edgeLeft, edgeBottom, py + cellSize); break;
        case 2: addSeg(edgeBottom, py + cellSize, px + cellSize, edgeRight); break;
        case 3: addSeg(px, edgeLeft, px + cellSize, edgeRight); break;
        case 4: addSeg(edgeTop, py, px + cellSize, edgeRight); break;
        case 5:
          addSeg(px, edgeLeft, edgeTop, py);
          addSeg(edgeBottom, py + cellSize, px + cellSize, edgeRight);
          break;
        case 6: addSeg(edgeTop, py, edgeBottom, py + cellSize); break;
        case 7: addSeg(px, edgeLeft, edgeTop, py); break;
        case 8: addSeg(edgeTop, py, px, edgeLeft); break;
        case 9: addSeg(edgeTop, py, edgeBottom, py + cellSize); break;
        case 10:
          addSeg(edgeTop, py, px + cellSize, edgeRight);
          addSeg(px, edgeLeft, edgeBottom, py + cellSize);
          break;
        case 11: addSeg(edgeTop, py, px + cellSize, edgeRight); break;
        case 12: addSeg(px, edgeLeft, px + cellSize, edgeRight); break;
        case 13: addSeg(edgeBottom, py + cellSize, px + cellSize, edgeRight); break;
        case 14: addSeg(px, edgeLeft, edgeBottom, py + cellSize); break;
      }
    }
  }
  return segments;
}

function draw() {
  ctx.fillStyle = '#0a0a0f';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  // Draw filled regions for depth
  for (let i = contourLevels - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    const level = (i + 1) / contourLevels;
    const alpha = 0.03 + (i / contourLevels) * 0.04;
    
    // Subtle fill based on elevation
    const hue = 280 + (level * 60); // purple to pink
    ctx.fillStyle = `hsla(${hue}, 70%, 20%, ${alpha})`;
    
    for (let y = 0; y < rows - 1; y++) {
      for (let x = 0; x < cols - 1; x++) {
        const val = terrain[getIdx(x, y)];
        if (val >= level) {
          ctx.fillRect(x * cellSize, y * cellSize, cellSize, cellSize);
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  // Draw contour lines
  for (let i = 0; i < contourLevels; i++) {
    const level = (i + 1) / contourLevels;
    const segments = getContourSegments(level);
    
    // Color: cyan at low elevation, pink at high
    const t = i / contourLevels;
    const r = Math.floor(40 + t * 215);
    const g = Math.floor(220 - t * 140);
    const b = Math.floor(220 + t * 35);
    
    const isMajor = i % 3 === 2;
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${isMajor ? 0.9 : 0.5})`;
    ctx.lineWidth = isMajor ? 1.5 : 0.7;
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    for (const seg of segments) {
      ctx.moveTo(seg.x1, seg.y1);
      ctx.lineTo(seg.x2, seg.y2);
    }
    ctx.stroke();
  }
  
  // Mouse cursor indicator
  if (mouse.x > 0 && mouse.y > 0) {
    const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(mouse.x, mouse.y, 0, mouse.x, mouse.y, 120);
    gradient.addColorStop(0, mouse.raising ? 'rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.15)' : 'rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.15)');
    gradient.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
    ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(mouse.x, mouse.y, 120, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
  }
  
  // Erosion indicator
  if (eroding) {
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(150, 100, 255, 0.7)';
    ctx.font = '12px monospace';
    ctx.fillText('⚡ erosion active', 20, 30);
  }
  
  // Update audio based on average elevation near mouse
  if (audioCtx && oscillators.length) {
    let avgElevation = 0.5;
    if (mouse.x > 0) {
      const mx = Math.floor(mouse.x / cellSize);
      const my = Math.floor(mouse.y / cellSize);
      if (mx >= 0 && mx < cols && my >= 0 && my < rows) {
        avgElevation = terrain[getIdx(mx, my)];
      }
    }
    
    oscillators.forEach((o, i) => {
      o.osc.frequency.setTargetAtTime(40 + avgElevation * 80 + i * 20, audioCtx.currentTime, 0.1);
      o.gain.gain.setTargetAtTime(0.015 * avgElevation, audioCtx.currentTime, 0.1);
    });
  }
}

function loop() {
  time++;
  updateTerrain();
  draw();
  requestAnimationFrame(loop);
}

// Events
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
  mouse.x = e.clientX;
  mouse.y = e.clientY;
  mouse.active = true;
});

canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
  mouse.active = false;
  mouse.x = -1000;
  mouse.y = -1000;
});

canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
  mouse.raising = e.button !== 2; // right click to lower
});

canvas.addEventListener('contextmenu', e => e.preventDefault());

canvas.addEventListener('click', () => {
  if (!audioCtx) initAudio();
  eroding = !eroding;
});

document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  if (e.code === 'Space') {
    e.preventDefault();
    eroding = !eroding;
  }
});

// Touch support
canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', e => {
  e.preventDefault();
  if (!audioCtx) initAudio();
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  mouse.x = touch.clientX;
  mouse.y = touch.clientY;
  mouse.active = true;
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', e => {
  e.preventDefault();
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  mouse.x = touch.clientX;
  mouse.y = touch.clientY;
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchend', () => {
  mouse.active = false;
  mouse.x = -1000;
  mouse.y = -1000;
});

// Init
resize();
loop();
</script>
</body>
</html>
